working_on: Tier-A Cluster 3 (goal-relative parameterization) — land learning_outcomes table + edge_outcome_necessity junction per ADR 0096 + dependency order C4 → C3 from ADR 0094; observe Issue #155 orphan-PID-blocker class for second empirical fire.
declared_scope: Author product ADR 0103 (Tier-A Cluster 3) committing schema for two new tables: public.learning_outcomes with (depth_level, bottleneck_move) tuple per ADR 0096 + nullable target_node_id FK to nodes + discipline TEXT + rationale_template JSONB + review_status='provisional' default; public.edge_outcome_necessity junction (edge_id FK, outcome_id FK, necessity_level CHECK IN ('required','recommended','optional'), confidence_for_outcome NUMERIC(3,2), rationale_for_outcome TEXT, review_status). Land migration 0150 + paired rollback per ADR 0055 Postcondition-Assertions grammar; apply via mcp__supabase__apply_migration with round-trip verify. Add three validate.py soft-warns + pytest coverage per feedback_no_pilot_wait_and_see. Amend ROUTING.md (claim 0150-0159 sub-range), PREDICATE_MANIFEST.md (necessity_level vocabulary), product/docs/architecture.md (Outcome Schema section). Secondary observation: watch for Issue #155 orphan-PID-blocker reoccurrence on apply_migration calls — empirical second-fire-or-no-fire informs whether ADR 0101 sequel is structural or one-time. phase: 6
